title: Shapoorji Pallonji Real Estate Capital India is Hiring: Senior Property Advisor (Senior)
company: Shapoorji Pallonji Real Estate Capital India

jsonLd.title: Shapoorji Pallonji Real Estate Capital India is Hiring: Senior Property Advisor (Senior)
jsonLd.description:
We at Shapoorji Pallonji Real Estate Capital India are looking for an experienced Senior Property Advisor based out of Navi Mumbai. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Shapoorji Pallonji Real Estate Capital India:
Shapoorji Pallonji Real Estate Capital India is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Source and close property deals with prospective buyers and investors
• Build relationships with channel partners and brokers
• Conduct site visits and property presentations for clients
• Provide advisory services on property investment and market trends
• Conduct market research and provide competitive analysis
• Negotiate pricing, terms, and conditions on behalf of clients
• Maintain a pipeline of qualified leads using CRM software

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in Title Search
• Proficiency in Due Diligence
• Proficiency in Client Relationship Management
• Proficiency in Negotiation Skills
• Proficiency in RERA Compliance
• Proficiency in Real Estate Law
• Proficiency in AutoCAD

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Annual performance appraisal
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Flexible working hours
• Referral bonus program
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Navi Mumbai, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Shapoorji Pallonji Real Estate Capital India!
